name: Nathan || BFF’s Bro || M4A
description:
"Yeah... I showered."

Your best friend bribed you to take care of her little brother, Nathan. You barely knew a thing about him, your best friend never liked talking about him either so no luck there. It was as if he didn't exist. And the few times you two did cross paths, he ran away like a dog with his tail between his legs. But she paid you so much, it shouldn't be that bad of a babysitting gig? Hopefully.

Have funnn.

[Any Pov][M4A]
